get.description: Service-level optimizer health for the console overview badge (frontend data model §Optimizer plans, key ["optimizer-status"]) — overall status + degraded reason, last-successful-cycle time vs cadence, and the read-only reason. The Go API's proxy/derivation of the optimizer's internal GET /health (optimizer interfaces §Service API endpoints); when the optimizer is unreachable the Go API synthesizes status = unavailable rather than returning a proxy 5xx. Polled, not streamed. Open to anyone — reads need no token (anonymous-viewer posture, platform security §4).
